meta.title: Contact Andrew Linh — Consulting and Technical Writing
meta.description: Contact Andrew Linh for consulting on backend architecture, structured data systems, AI-native tooling, developer platforms, or technical writing engagements.

data.label: Contact
data.title: Let’s talk about architecture, tooling, or writing
data.description: If you are working on a backend platform, a structured content system, or internal tooling that needs sharper contracts and clearer operational behavior, I would be glad to hear more.

data.label: Reach out
data.title: Project inquiries and editorial work
data.description: Share the problem space, current team shape, and what success would look like. Short notes are fine.
data.formNote: Typical topics: architecture reviews, platform strategy, structured content modeling, AI agent tooling, and technical writing retainers.

data.label: Working style
data.title: Calm collaboration, explicit decisions, written follow-through
data.description: I like engagements where architecture is discussed in enough detail to make trade-offs visible. That often means short discovery conversations, a clear document trail, and simple communication rhythms.

image.alt: Minimal meeting space with laptop and notebook on a table

data.note: Remote-friendly, async-friendly, and comfortable working with product, platform, and leadership stakeholders.

data.label: Availability
data.title: Open to focused consulting engagements and writing commissions
data.description: The best fit is usually a well-scoped systems problem with real business stakes and a team that values technical clarity.
